reports.freeformContent:
BED REST CERTIFICATE

Date: 2026-05-20

To Whom It May Concern,

This is to certify that kholoud siam, has been examined at our ophthalmology clinic on 2026-05-18.

MEDICAL RECOMMENDATION:
Based on clinical assessment, the patient is advised bed rest for 3 day(s), effective from 2026-05-18.

REASON / DIAGNOSIS:
[H16.0] Corneal ulcer

ACTIVITY RESTRICTIONS:
• Avoid strenuous physical activity and heavy lifting
• Limit prolonged reading and screen use as clinically indicated
• Use prescribed eye drops and medications as directed
• Attend ophthalmology follow-up on 2026-05-22 or sooner if symptoms worsen

This certificate is issued at the patient's request for administrative and sick-leave purposes.

Dr. Mahmoud Sami Abouzeid
MD, FRCS (Glasgow), PhD
Consultant Ophthalmologist
